examples: This $60, 000 luxury sedan is the biggest stretch yet for the Korean carmaker, which has steadily improved its reputation over the past decade.
Ford almost bought the carmaker two years ago, but pulled out after finding that Daewoo would be too hard to turn round.
Porsche, a carmaker controlled by the Piech and Porsche families, also had to be bailed out after a bid to buy Volkswagen backfired.
Fiat is in danger of following too closely in the footsteps of another European carmaker, Daimler.
In addition, frequent work stoppages by Hyundai's unionised workers also affected the carmaker's earnings.
